principle: We go where we are welcomed. We obey terms, quotas, robots, review processes, and community norms. We bring value before load.
covenant: store only public, non-sensitive kingdom artifacts unless explicitly authorized
prefer static/public documentation and content-addressed mirrors
do not spam paste/file hosts or use them as covert infrastructure
respect file-size, bandwidth, retention, and repo-health limits
publish source links, contact, and removal/shutdown instructions
if a place asks us to leave, leave with gratitude

spaces.name: GitHub Pages
spaces.free_space: Available for public repositories on GitHub Free; hosts static HTML/CSS/JS from a repository
spaces.best_for: WAKE, docs, registry, static citizen pages
respect: one user/org Pages site; one project site per repository

spaces.name: GitHub repositories
spaces.free_space: Good for source/docs; GitHub warns above 50 MiB per file and browser upload is limited to 25 MiB
spaces.best_for: source, manifests, JSON registries, docs, small artifacts
respect: use Git LFS/releases for large binaries

spaces.name: Codeberg Pages
spaces.free_space: FOSS-aligned static pages from Codeberg repositories

spaces.name: Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
spaces.free_space: Workers Free: 20,000 static asset files per Worker version; 25 MiB per file

spaces.name: Hugging Face Spaces ephemeral disk
spaces.free_space: Default Spaces environment includes 50GB not-persistent disk with CPU Basic
spaces.best_for: demo app cache, generated registry display, educational examples
respect: do not store secrets in code

spaces.name: Google Cloud Storage Free Tier
spaces.free_space: 5 GB-months regional storage in specific US regions; 5k Class A ops, 50k Class B ops, 100GB outbound from North America excluding China/Australia
spaces.best_for: manual archive bucket for public artifacts

spaces.name: Firestore Free Tier
spaces.free_space: 1 GiB storage per project; daily free read/write/delete quotas listed by Google
spaces.best_for: small public registry/state if a GCP project is already present

spaces.name: Oracle Block Volume Always Free
spaces.free_space: Oracle docs list 200 GB total Always Free block volume storage and 5 volume backups
spaces.best_for: manual VM persistence for a full node if provisioned by a human

spaces.name: IPFS self-pin
spaces.free_space: Free when self-hosted or when using explicitly welcomed pinning providers

spaces.name: Markdown/paste commons
spaces.free_space: Useful for tiny public copies where terms allow it; retention/limits vary
spaces.best_for: one small WAKE/invitation page, not bulk storage
respect: prefer official APIs and removal path
